title: Madeleine Brettingham Work In Progress
description: "Madeleine Brettingham is a writer and rising star on the stand-up circuit, who recently scooped a string of competition wins including winning the prestigious So You Think You’re Funny 2025 and taking silver in Funny Women in the same year, a unique double. Join her at the Caroline of Brunswick to see her work in progress of her debut show. She’s been praised for her “distinctive worldview” (Chortle), “tight and gag-packed” writing (Bruce Dessau), and “knack for blending offbeat observations with pacey, unexpected punchlines” (The List). "A suffer-no-fools attitude that own the stage, a formidable gag rate and a precision with language that conjures up the perfect images” - Chortle
